actionCalls.description: Calls an action that creates a quote.
actionCalls.name: InvokePlaceSalesTransactionApi
actionCalls.label: Invoke Place Sales Transaction API

assignments.description: Handle the runtime exception while calling the Place Sales Transaction invocable action.
assignments.name: ErrorMessageAssignment
assignments.label: Error Message Assignment

assignments.description: Handle the null Product Selling Model Id error assignment.
assignments.name: NullProductSellingModelErrorAssignment
assignments.label: Null Product Selling Model Error Assignment

assignments.description: Populates Quote Line fields based on a Annual Billing Frequency.
assignments.name: Set_Annual_Revenue_Variables
assignments.label: Set Annual Revenue Variables

assignments.description: Sets the Quote Line's default Billing Schedule value.
assignments.name: Set_Billing_Schedule_from_Metadata
assignments.label: Set Billing Schedule from Metadata

assignments.description: If no Billing Schedule value is found, set the Status.
assignments.name: Set_Billing_Schedule_Status
assignments.label: Set Billing Schedule Status

assignments.description: Populates Quote Line fields based on a Monthly Billing Frequency.
assignments.name: Set_Monthly_Revenue_Variables
assignments.label: Set Monthly Revenue Variables

assignments.description: Populates Quote Line's values based on One-Time Products fields.
assignments.name: Set_One_Time_Revenue_Variables
assignments.label: Set One-Time Revenue Variables

assignments.description: Populates Quote Line fields based on a Quarterly Billing Frequency.
assignments.name: Set_Quarterly_Revenue_Variables
assignments.label: Set Quarterly Revenue Variables

assignments.description: Sets the default fields on the quote line by the corresponding Quote and Product fields (if not blank). This element is used to construct the Graph Apex-defined type input for the PlaceSalesTransaction invocable action.
assignments.name: Set_Quote_Line_Default_Variables
assignments.label: Set Quote Line Default Variables

assignments.description: Sets the custom fields for the quoteLineItemRecordReference apex-defined variable.
assignments.name: Set_Quote_Line_Item_Record_Custom_Reference_Variables
assignments.label: Set Quote Line Item Record Custom Reference Variables

assignments.description: Sets custom fields on the quote line by populating the record map wrappers. This element is used to construct the Graph Apex-defined type input for the PlaceSalesTransaction invocable action.
assignments.name: Set_Quote_Line_Wrapper_Custom_Fields
assignments.label: Set Quote Line Wrapper Custom Fields

assignments.description: Sets the EndDate, SubscriptionTerm fields on the quote line item record for term-defined products.
assignments.name: Set_Term_Defined_Variables
assignments.label: Set Term-Defined Variables

assignments.description: Set the error message from the Place Sales Transaction invocable action.
assignments.name: SetErrorMessage
assignments.label: Set Error Message

assignments.description: Sets the values for the placeSalesTransactionGraph apex-defined variable.
assignments.name: SetPlaceSalesTransactionGraphVariables
assignments.label: Set Place Sales Transaction Graph Variables

assignments.description: Sets priceBookId to the ID of the price book for the opportunity related to the quote in the Quote from Get Quote variable.
assignments.name: SetPriceBookToOpportunityPriceBook
assignments.label: Set Price Book to Opportunity Price Book

assignments.description: Sets priceBookId to the ID of the price book for the quote in the Quote from Get Quote variable.
assignments.name: SetPriceBookToQuotePriceBook
assignments.label: Set Price Book to Quote Price Book

assignments.description: Sets the fields on the quote by populating the record map wrappers. This element is used to construct the Graph Apex-defined type input for the PlaceSalesTransaction invocable action.
assignments.name: SetQuoteFields
assignments.label: Set Quote Fields

assignments.description: Sets the standard fields for the quoteLineItemRecordReference apex-defined variable.
assignments.name: SetQuoteLineItemRecordStandardReferenceVariables
assignments.label: Set Quote Line Item Record Standard Reference Variables

assignments.description: Sets the start date and period boundary fields on the quote line item record for evergreen products.
assignments.name: SetStartDateandPeriodBoundaryVariables
assignments.label: Set Start Date and Period Boundary Variables

decisions.description: Determines whether a Billing Schedule mapping exists.
decisions.name: Billing_Schedule_Mapping_Found
decisions.label: Billing Schedule Mapping Found?

decisions.description: Identifies if Quote Line qualifies for Auto-Renew.
decisions.name: Is_Auto_Renew
decisions.label: Is Auto-Renew?

decisions.description: Determines whether the product selling method type matches 'TermDefined'.
decisions.name: Is_Term_Defined
decisions.label: Is Term-Defined?

decisions.description: Check if input productSellingModelId is null
decisions.name: IsProductSellingModelIdNull
decisions.label: Is Product Selling Model Id Null?

decisions.description: Handle the output from Place Sales Transaction.
decisions.name: Result
decisions.label: Result

decisions.description: Determines which price book is stored for the quote. Checks if the price book is referenced on the quote in the Quote from Get Quote variable, if there’s a price book referenced on the opportunity related to the record in the Quote from Get Quote variable, or there isn’t a price book referenced on either the quote or the opportunity.
decisions.name: SetWhichPriceBook
decisions.label: Set Which PriceBook?

decisions.description: Determines whether the Product's default Billing Frequency is: Monthly, Quarterly, Annual, or Upfront (One-Time).
decisions.name: What_is_the_Product_s_Default_Billing_Frequency
decisions.label: What is the Product's Default Billing Frequency?

Flow.description: Adds Techvera Product Quote Lines to a Quote

formulas.description: Calculate current date, the format is yyyy-mm-dd. If no StartDate input, the CurrentStartDate will be used in QuoteLineItem.
formulas.name: CurrentStartDate

Flow.interviewLabel: Add QuoteLineItem to Quote - Techvera Lifecycle {!$Flow.CurrentDateTime}
Flow.label: Add QuoteLineItem to Quote - Techvera Lifecycle

recordLookups.description: Gets the Billing Schedule metadata record. Stores the value in the custom Billing Schedule metadata type from Get Billing Schedule variable.
recordLookups.name: Get_Billing_Schedule_Mapping
recordLookups.label: Get Billing Schedule Mapping

recordLookups.description: Gets the price book entry with a price book ID that matches the PriceBookId variable, a product ID that matches the productId variable, and a product selling model ID that matches the ID in the Product Selling Model from Get Default Product Selling Model variable. Stores the result in the Price Book Entry from Get Price Book Entry variable.
recordLookups.name: GetPriceBookEntry
recordLookups.label: Get Price Book Entry

recordLookups.description: Gets the product record with an ID that matches the productId passed into the flow. Stores the value in the Product from Get Product variable.
recordLookups.name: GetProduct
recordLookups.label: Get Product

recordLookups.description: Gets the product selling model with an ID that matches the ID in the Product Selling Model Option from Get Default Product Selling Model Option variable. Stores the result in the Product Selling Model from Get Default Product Selling Model variable.
recordLookups.name: GetProductSellingModel
recordLookups.label: Get Product Selling Model

recordLookups.description: Gets the quote record with an ID that matches the quoteId passed into the flow. Stores the result in the Quote from Get Quote variable.
recordLookups.name: GetQuote
recordLookups.label: Get Quote

recordLookups.description: Get the standard price book. The flow uses the standard price book when the quote or opportunity doesn't have a related price book. Stores the ID of the PriceBookId variable.
recordLookups.name: GetStandardPriceBook
recordLookups.label: Get Standard Price Book

variables.description: Stores the record map wrapper Apex-defined type that specifies the QuoteLineItem.ARR__c field name (key) and value (object) for the quote. This variable is used to construct the Graph Apex-defined type input for the PlaceSalesTransaction invocable action.
variables.name: ARRRecordMapWrapper

variables.description: Stores the record map wrapper Apex-defined type that specifies the QuoteLineItem.Billing_Date__c field name (key) and value (object) for the quote. This variable is used to construct the Graph Apex-defined type input for the PlaceSalesTransaction invocable action.
variables.name: billingDateRecordMapWrapper

variables.description: The Billing Frequency for subscription products (Evergreen or Term-Defined Product Selling Model)
variables.name: billingFrequency

variables.description: Stores the record map wrapper Apex-defined type that specifies the QuoteLineItem.BillingFrequency field name (key) and value (object) for the quote. This variable is used to construct the Graph Apex-defined type input for the PlaceSalesTransaction invocable action.
variables.name: billingFrequencyRecordMapWrapper

variables.description: Stores the record map wrapper Apex-defined type that specifies the QuoteLineItem.Charge_Type__c field name (key) and value (object) for the quote. This variable is used to construct the Graph Apex-defined type input for the PlaceSalesTransaction invocable action.
variables.name: billingscheduleRecordMapWrapper

variables.description: Stores the record map wrapper Apex-defined type that specifies the QuoteLineItem.Billing_Schedule_Status__c field name (key) and value (object) for the quote. This variable is used to construct the Graph Apex-defined type input for the PlaceSalesTransaction invocable action.
variables.name: billingschedulestatusRecordMapWrapper

variables.description: Stores the record map wrapper Apex-defined type that specifies the Quote.BillingCity__c field name (key) and value (object) for the quote. This variable is used to construct the Graph Apex-defined type input for the PlaceSalesTransaction invocable action.
variables.name: billToCityRecordMapWrapper

variables.description: Stores the record map wrapper Apex-defined type that specifies the Quote.BillingCountry__c field name (key) and value (object) for the quote. This variable is used to construct the Graph Apex-defined type input for the PlaceSalesTransaction invocable action.
variables.name: billToCountryRecordMapWrapper

variables.description: Stores the record map wrapper Apex-defined type that specifies the Quote.BillingPostalCode__c field name (key) and value (object) for the quote. This variable is used to construct the Graph Apex-defined type input for the PlaceSalesTransaction invocable action.
variables.name: billToPostalCodeRecordMapWrapper

variables.description: Stores the record map wrapper Apex-defined type that specifies the Quote.BillingState__c field name (key) and value (object) for the quote. This variable is used to construct the Graph Apex-defined type input for the PlaceSalesTransaction invocable action.
variables.name: billToStateRecordMapWrapper

variables.description: Stores the record map wrapper Apex-defined type that specifies the Quote.BillingStreet__c field name (key) and value (object) for the quote. This variable is used to construct the Graph Apex-defined type input for the PlaceSalesTransaction invocable action.
variables.name: billToStreetRecordMapWrapper

variables.description: Stores the record map wrapper Apex-defined type that specifies the QuoteLineItem.Charge_Type__c field name (key) and value (object) for the quote. This variable is used to construct the Graph Apex-defined type input for the PlaceSalesTransaction invocable action.
variables.name: chargeTypeRecordMapWrapper

variables.description: Stores the record map wrapper Apex-defined type that specifies the Quote.Contains_Partner_Subscriptions__c field name (key) and value (object) for the quote. This variable is used to construct the Graph Apex-defined type input for the PlaceSalesTransaction invocable action.
variables.name: containspartnersubscriptionsRecordMapWrapper

variables.description: The custom Billing Frequency setup for Techvera and not controlled by RLM.
variables.name: customQLBillingFrequency

variables.description: Stores the record map wrapper Apex-defined type that specifies the custom QuoteLineItem.BillingFrequency field name (key) and value (object) for the quote. This variable is used to construct the Graph Apex-defined type input for the PlaceSalesTransaction invocable action.
variables.name: customQLbillingFrequencyRecordMapWrapper

variables.description: Stores the record map wrapper Apex-defined type that specifies the QuoteLineItem.Delta_ARR__c field name (key) and value (object) for the quote. This variable is used to construct the Graph Apex-defined type input for the PlaceSalesTransaction invocable action.
variables.name: DeltaARRRecordMapWrapper

variables.description: Stores the record map wrapper Apex-defined type that specifies the QuoteLineItem.doesAutomaticallyRenew field name (key) and value (object) for the quote. This variable is used to construct the Graph Apex-defined type input for the PlaceSalesTransaction invocable action.
variables.name: doesAutomaticallyRenewRecordMapWrapper

variables.description: The endDate, needed only for term-defined products. The format must be yyyy-mm-dd.
variables.name: endDate

variables.description: Stores the record map wrapper Apex-defined type that specifies the QuoteLineItem.EndDate field name (key) and value (object) for the quote. This variable is used to construct the Graph Apex-defined type input for the PlaceSalesTransaction invocable action.
variables.name: endDateRecordMapWrapper

variables.description: Provides an error message if applicable.
variables.name: errorMessage

variables.description: An apex defined type that contains a list of errors with errorMessage, referenceId, and errorCode
variables.name: errorResponse

variables.description: Stores the record map wrapper Apex-defined type that specifies the Quote.NEO_Hardware_Order__c field name (key) and value (object) for the quote. This variable is used to construct the Graph Apex-defined type input for the PlaceSalesTransaction invocable action.
variables.name: hardwareorderRecordMapWrapper

variables.description: Stores the record map wrapper Apex-defined type that specifies the QuoteLineItem.Hardware_Product__c field name (key) and value (object) for the quote. This variable is used to construct the Graph Apex-defined type input for the PlaceSalesTransaction invocable action.
variables.name: hardwareproductRecordMapWrapper

variables.description: Indicates success or failure.
variables.name: isSuccess

variables.description: Stores the record map wrapper Apex-defined type that specifies the Quote.Legacy__c field name (key) and value (object) for the quote. This variable is used to construct the Graph Apex-defined type input for the PlaceSalesTransaction invocable action.
variables.name: legacyRecordMapWrapper

variables.description: Stores the record map wrapper Apex-defined type that specifies the QuoteLineItem.MRR__c field name (key) and value (object) for the quote. This variable is used to construct the Graph Apex-defined type input for the PlaceSalesTransaction invocable action.
variables.name: MRRRecordMapWrapper

variables.description: Stores the record map wrapper Apex-defined type that specifies the QuoteLineItem.Next_Renewal_Date__c field name (key) and value (object) for the quote. This variable is used to construct the Graph Apex-defined type input for the PlaceSalesTransaction invocable action.
variables.name: nextRenewalDateRecordMapWrapper

variables.description: Error message thrown when productSellingModelId is null.
variables.name: nullProductSellingModelIdErrorMessage

value.stringValue: Product Selling Model Id is required but was not provided.

variables.description: Stores the record map wrapper Apex-defined type that specifies the QuoteLineItem.One_Time_Amount__c field name (key) and value (object) for the quote. This variable is used to construct the Graph Apex-defined type input for the PlaceSalesTransaction invocable action.
variables.name: onetimeamountRecordMapWrapper

variables.description: Stores the record map wrapper Apex-defined type that specifies the Quote.One_Time_Total__c field name (key) and value (object) for the quote. This variable is used to construct the Graph Apex-defined type input for the PlaceSalesTransaction invocable action.
variables.name: onetimetotalRecordMapWrapper

variables.description: Stores the record map wrapper Apex-defined type that specifies the QuoteLineItem.PeriodBoundary field name (key) and value (object) for the quote. This variable is used to construct the Graph Apex-defined type input for the PlaceSalesTransaction invocable action.
variables.name: periodBoundaryRecordMapWrapper

variables.description: Stores values for the Graph Apex-defined type that’s used as an input for the PlaceSalesTransaction invocable action.
variables.name: placeSalesTransactionGraph

variables.description: Stores the record map wrapper Apex-defined type that specifies the QuoteLineItem.PricebookEntry field name (key) and value (object) for the quote. This variable is used to construct the Graph Apex-defined type input for the PlaceSalesTransaction invocable action.
variables.name: pricebookEntryRecordMapWrapper

variables.description: Stores the ID of the price book record that’s used to add a quote line item to the quote. If a price book isn’t specified on the quote or the opportunity, then the flow uses the standard pricebook as a default.
variables.name: pricebookId

variables.description: Stores the record map wrapper Apex-defined type that specifies the QuoteLineItem.Pricebook2Id field name (key) and value (object) for the quote. This variable is used to construct the Graph Apex-defined type input for the PlaceSalesTransaction invocable action.
variables.name: pricebookNameRecordMapWrapper

variables.description: Stores the ID of the product that’s passed into the flow.
variables.name: productId

variables.description: Stores the record map wrapper Apex-defined type that specifies the QuoteLineItem.Product2 field name (key) and value (object) for the quote. This variable is used to construct the Graph Apex-defined type input for the PlaceSalesTransaction invocable action.
variables.name: productRecordMapWrapper

variables.description: The default ProductSellingModel ID associated with the product being added to the quote.
variables.name: productSellingModelID

variables.description: Stores the quantity of the product that’s passed into the flow and added to the quote line item. If no quantity is specified, the flow uses the default of 1.
variables.name: quantity

variables.description: Stores the record map wrapper Apex-defined type that specifies the QuoteLineItem.PricebookEntry field name (key) and value (object) for the quote. This variable is used to construct the Graph Apex-defined type input for the PlaceSalesTransaction invocable action.
variables.name: quantityRecordMapWrapper

variables.description: Stores the record map wrapper Apex-defined type that specifies the Quote.doesAutomaticallyRenew__c field name (key) and value (object) for the quote. This variable is used to construct the Graph Apex-defined type input for the PlaceSalesTransaction invocable action.
variables.name: quotedoesautomaticallyrenewRecordMapWrapper

variables.description: Stores the ID of the quote record that’s passed into the flow.
variables.name: quoteId

variables.description: Stores the record map wrapper Apex-defined type that specifies the QuoteLineItem.QuoteId field name (key) and value (object) for the quote. This variable is used to construct the Graph Apex-defined type input for the PlaceSalesTransaction invocable action.
variables.name: quoteIdRecordMapWrapper

variables.description: Stores the record map wrapper Apex-defined type that specifies the QuoteLineItem.Detailed_Line_Description__c field name (key) and value (object) for the quote. This variable is used to construct the Graph Apex-defined type input for the PlaceSalesTransaction invocable action.
variables.name: quotelineDetailedLineDescriptionRecordMapWrapper

variables.description: Stores the record map wrapper Apex-defined type that specifies the QuoteLineItem.Legacy__c field name (key) and value (object) for the quote. This variable is used to construct the Graph Apex-defined type input for the PlaceSalesTransaction invocable action.
variables.name: quotelinelegacyRecordMapWrapper

variables.description: Stores the record map wrapper Apex-defined type that specifies the QuoteLineItem.Partner_Subscriptions__c field name (key) and value (object) for the quote. This variable is used to construct the Graph Apex-defined type input for the PlaceSalesTransaction invocable action.
variables.name: quotelinepartnersubscriptionsRecordMapWrapper

variables.description: Stores the record map wrapper Apex-defined type that specifies the QuoteLineItem.Product_Family__c field name (key) and value (object) for the quote. This variable is used to construct the Graph Apex-defined type input for the PlaceSalesTransaction invocable action.
variables.name: quotelineProductFamilyRecordMapWrapper

variables.description: Stores the record map wrapper Apex-defined type that specifies the QuoteLineItem.Product_Type__c field name (key) and value (object) for the quote. This variable is used to construct the Graph Apex-defined type input for the PlaceSalesTransaction invocable action.
variables.name: quotelineProductTypeRecordMapWrapper

variables.description: Stores the record reference for the quote line item that this flow creates. This variable is used to construct the Graph Apex-defined type input for the PlaceSalesTransaction invocable action.
variables.name: quoteLineRecordReference

variables.description: Stores the record map wrapper Apex-defined type that specifies the QuoteLineItem.Revenue_Calculation_Status__c field name (key) and value (object) for the quote. This variable is used to construct the Graph Apex-defined type input for the PlaceSalesTransaction invocable action.
variables.name: quotelinerevenuecalculationstatusRecordMapWrapper

variables.description: Stores the record map wrapper Apex-defined type that specifies the Quote.Next_Renewal_Date__c field name (key) and value (object) for the quote. This variable is used to construct the Graph Apex-defined type input for the PlaceSalesTransaction invocable action.
variables.name: quotenextrenewaldateRecordMapWrapper

variables.description: Stores the record reference for the quote that this flow modifies. This variable is used to construct the Graph Apex-defined type input for the PlaceSalesTransaction invocable action.
variables.name: quoteRecordReference

variables.description: Stores the record map wrapper Apex-defined type that specifies the Quote.Renewal_Date_c field name (key) and value (object) for the quote. This variable is used to construct the Graph Apex-defined type input for the PlaceSalesTransaction invocable action.
variables.name: quoterenewaldateRecordMapWrapper

variables.description: Stores the record map wrapper Apex-defined type that specifies the QuoteLineItem.Recurring_Amount__c field name (key) and value (object) for the quote. This variable is used to construct the Graph Apex-defined type input for the PlaceSalesTransaction invocable action.
variables.name: recurringamountRecordMapWrapper

variables.description: Stores the record map wrapper Apex-defined type that specifies the Quote.Recurring_Total__c field name (key) and value (object) for the quote. This variable is used to construct the Graph Apex-defined type input for the PlaceSalesTransaction invocable action.
variables.name: recurringtotalRecordMapWrapper

variables.description: Stores the record map wrapper Apex-defined type that specifies the QuoteLineItem.Renewal_Amount__c field name (key) and value (object) for the quote. This variable is used to construct the Graph Apex-defined type input for the PlaceSalesTransaction invocable action.
variables.name: renewalAmountARRRecordMapWrapper

variables.description: Stores the record map wrapper Apex-defined type that specifies the QuoteLineItem.Renewal_Date__c field name (key) and value (object) for the quote. This variable is used to construct the Graph Apex-defined type input for the PlaceSalesTransaction invocable action.
variables.name: renewalDateRecordMapWrapper

variables.description: Stores the record map wrapper Apex-defined type that specifies the Quote.Revenue_Calculation_Status__c field name (key) and value (object) for the quote. This variable is used to construct the Graph Apex-defined type input for the PlaceSalesTransaction invocable action.
variables.name: revenuecalculationstatusRecordMapWrapper

variables.description: Stores the record map wrapper Apex-defined type that specifies the Quote.ShippingCity_c field name (key) and value (object) for the quote. This variable is used to construct the Graph Apex-defined type input for the PlaceSalesTransaction invocable action.
variables.name: shipToCityRecordMapWrapper

variables.description: Stores the record map wrapper Apex-defined type that specifies the Quote.ShippingCountry_c field name (key) and value (object) for the quote. This variable is used to construct the Graph Apex-defined type input for the PlaceSalesTransaction invocable action.
variables.name: shipToCountryRecordMapWrapper

variables.description: Stores the record map wrapper Apex-defined type that specifies the Quote.ShippingPostalCode_c field name (key) and value (object) for the quote. This variable is used to construct the Graph Apex-defined type input for the PlaceSalesTransaction invocable action.
variables.name: shipToPostalCodeRecordMapWrapper

variables.description: Stores the record map wrapper Apex-defined type that specifies the Quote.ShippingState_c field name (key) and value (object) for the quote. This variable is used to construct the Graph Apex-defined type input for the PlaceSalesTransaction invocable action.
variables.name: shipToStateRecordMapWrapper

variables.description: Stores the record map wrapper Apex-defined type that specifies the Quote.ShippingStreet_c field name (key) and value (object) for the quote. This variable is used to construct the Graph Apex-defined type input for the PlaceSalesTransaction invocable action.
variables.name: shipToStreetRecordMapWrapper

variables.description: Stores the startDate for subscription products passed into the flow. Default value is the current start date. Optional user input.
variables.name: startDate

variables.description: Stores the record map wrapper Apex-defined type that specifies the QuoteLineItem.StartDate field name (key) and value (object) for the quote. This variable is used to construct the Graph Apex-defined type input for the PlaceSalesTransaction invocable action.
variables.name: startDateRecordMapWrapper

variables.description: Stores the record map wrapper Apex-defined type that specifies the QuoteLineItem.SubscriptionTerm field name (key) and value (object) for the quote. This variable is used to construct the Graph Apex-defined type input for the PlaceSalesTransaction invocable action.
variables.name: subscriptionTermRecordMapWrapper

variables.description: Stores the record map wrapper Apex-defined type that specifies the Quote.Total_ARR__c field name (key) and value (object) for the quote. This variable is used to construct the Graph Apex-defined type input for the PlaceSalesTransaction invocable action.
variables.name: totalARRRecordMapWrapper

variables.description: Stores the record map wrapper Apex-defined type that specifies the Quote.Total_Delta_ARR__c field name (key) and value (object) for the quote. This variable is used to construct the Graph Apex-defined type input for the PlaceSalesTransaction invocable action.
variables.name: totalDeltaARRRecordMapWrapper

variables.description: Stores the record map wrapper Apex-defined type that specifies the Quote.Total_MRR__c field name (key) and value (object) for the quote. This variable is used to construct the Graph Apex-defined type input for the PlaceSalesTransaction invocable action.
variables.name: totalMRRRecordMapWrapper

variables.description: Stores the record map wrapper Apex-defined type that specifies the Quote.Total_Renewal_ARR__c field name (key) and value (object) for the quote. This variable is used to construct the Graph Apex-defined type input for the PlaceSalesTransaction invocable action.
variables.name: totalRenewalARRRecordMapWrapper

variables.description: Stores the record map wrapper Apex-defined type that specifies the Quote.Total_Up_For_Renewal_ARR__c field name (key) and value (object) for the quote. This variable is used to construct the Graph Apex-defined type input for the PlaceSalesTransaction invocable action.
variables.name: totalUpForRenewalARRRecordMapWrapper

variables.description: Stores the record map wrapper Apex-defined type that specifies the QuoteLineItem.Up_For_Renewal_Amount_ARR__c field name (key) and value (object) for the quote. This variable is used to construct the Graph Apex-defined type input for the PlaceSalesTransaction invocable action.
variables.name: upForRenewalAmountARRRecordMapWrapper

variables.description: Not associated with RLM's Billing Frequency.
variables.name: varFinalCustomQLBillingFrequency
